title: Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
description: LLNL Want Ads is a free classified advertising service provided to LLNL retirees, employees and contractors. Ads are published weekly — see them now.
text: LLNL Want Ads is a free classified advertising service provided to LLNL retirees, employees and contractors. Ads are published weekly in the Retiree and Employee Resources category of the LLNL website. The Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory reserves the right to edit or reject want ad submissions at its discretion. Ads for houses, apartments or condominiums for rent or sales are not accepted (rooms for rent and vacation rentals are). Also prohibited are ads for items that require a license to sell (such as guns), airline tickets, raffle promotions and personal ads. To submit a request for an ad to be included, please complete this form. To have an ad removed or to submit a question, email osc [at] llnl.gov (osc[at]llnl[dot]gov).
